stream_summary: Add validation for agent_config files in the saga validator. Ensures configuration errors are caught early before saga execution.

related_acceptance_criteria.criterion: Validation ensures agent_config file exists if specified
related_acceptance_criteria.gherkin: Given a step.json with agent_config pointing to non-existent file, When saga validation runs, Then validation fails with clear error message

related_acceptance_criteria.criterion: Agent config with invalid permissions structure is rejected
related_acceptance_criteria.gherkin: Given an agent-config.json with malformed permissions, When DevinWrapper loads it, Then an error is raised

related_edge_cases.criterion: Given no global .devin/agent-config.json and step has no agent_config, When step executes, Then error indicates missing config

related_edge_cases.case: Agent config file is not readable (permission denied)
related_edge_cases.criterion: Given agent-config.json with no read permissions, When step executes, Then error indicates permission issue

stream_steps.title: Add Validation to Saga Validator
stream_steps.description: Validate agent_config file existence during saga validation
tasks: Handle missing global config fallback case
acceptance_criteria: Saga validation fails if agent_config file missing
Error message indicates missing file path
Validation passes if agent_config file exists
Validation passes if agent_config not specified
Validation fails if global config missing and no agent_config

relevant_context.relevance: Current validation logic that needs to be extended
Saga definition structures used in validation
Pattern to follow for agent_config validation

success_criteria: Saga validator checks agent_config file existence
Clear error messages for missing files
notes: Validation layer is critical for catching configuration errors early. Must be completed before integration testing.
